0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","h1",null,{"children":"Hybrid Search"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne's flagship retrieval capability — combining dense vector similarity with SQLite FTS5 full-text search for results that are both semantically relevant and precisely matched."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Why Hybrid?"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["| Approach | Strengths | Weaknesses |\n|----------|-----------|------------|\n| Vector only | Semantic similarity, fuzzy matching | Misses exact terms, no boolean logic |\n| Text only | Exact matching, boolean queries | No semantic understanding, synonym blind |\n| ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"Hybrid"}]," | ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"Best of both"}]," | ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"Slightly higher latency"}]," |"]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Fusion Algorithm"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"final_score = (vector_score * vector_weight) + \n            (text_score * text_weight) + \n            (temporal_score * temporal_weight)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Default weights:"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Vector: 0.5"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Text: 0.3"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Temporal: 0.2"}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Usage"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"# Default hybrid search\nresults = mem.recall(\"What database does the project use?\")\n\n# Custom weights\nresults = mem.recall(\n  \"What database does the project use?\",\n  vector_weight=0.3,   # Prefer exact text matches\n  text_weight=0.6,\n  temporal_weight=0.1,\n)\n\n# With filters\nresults = mem.recall(\n  \"database migration\",\n  tags=[\"backend\", \"infrastructure\"],\n  since=\"2026-04-01\",\n  top_k=5,\n)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Result Format"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"[\n  {\n      \"id\": \"mem_abc123\",\n      \"content\": \"We decided to use PostgreSQL for the primary database...\",\n      \"score\": 0.92,\n      \"vector_score\": 0.88,\n      \"text_score\": 0.95,\n      \"source\": \"decision\",\n      \"created_at\": 1714060800,\n  },\n  ...\n]\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Performance"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"| Query Type | Median Latency | p99 Latency |\n|------------|---------------|-------------|\n| Vector only | 35ms | 120ms |\n| FTS5 only | 15ms | 45ms |\n| Hybrid (default) | 65ms | 180ms |\n| Hybrid + filters | 85ms | 250ms |"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Tuning Weights"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Different use cases benefit from different weight configurations:"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"| Use Case | Vector | Text | Temporal |\n|----------|--------|------|----------|\n| Fact lookup | 0.2 | 0.7 | 0.1 |\n| Concept search | 0.7 | 0.2 | 0.1 |\n| Recent events | 0.3 | 0.3 | 0.4 |\n| General recall | 0.5 | 0.3 | 0.2 |"}],"\n",["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-info","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L3",null,{"iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 16v-4","key":"1dtifu"}],["path",{"d":"M12 8h.01","key":"e9boi3"}]],"className":"lucide-info shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Index Requirements"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":"Hybrid search requires both vector and FTS5 indices to be built. These are created automatically on first use. Initial index build may take a few seconds for large datasets."}]}]]}]]}]}]],[["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/06qv3~~e._cb6.js","async":true}],["$","script","script-1",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0nuipubmwenwa.js","async":true}],["$","script","script-2",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0fekzj03ltn5y.js","async":true}],["$","script","script-3",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0pqew2nbfoy2f.js","async":true}],["$","script","script-4",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/07.05twov8012.js","async":true}],"$L4","$L5","$L6","$L7","$L8"],"$L9"]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"oLBkLcipfllBBS_uEwuBd"}
